---
title: "Review attestation"
date: last-modified
aliases:
  - /guide/review-attestation.html
---

Review an attestation to verify model attributes and provide feedback. This process allows validators to assess the attestation content and make a decision on its acceptance.

::: {.attn}

## Prerequisites

- [x] {{< var link.login >}}
- [x] The model is already registered in the model inventory.[^1]
- [x] An attestation has been submitted for review.[^2]
- [x] You are a [{{< fa circle-check >}} Validator]{.bubble} or assigned another role with sufficient permissions to review attestations.[^3]

:::

## Steps

1. In the left sidebar, click **{{< fa cubes >}} Inventory**.

2. Select a model or find your model by applying a filter or searching for it.[^4]

3. In the left sidebar that appears for your model, click **{{< fa shield >}} Validation Report**.

4. Locate the attestation in the **Attestations** section and click on it to open the review interface.

5. Review the attestation content:
   - Model snapshot and findings at the time of attestation creation
   - Custom fields and their values
   - Questionnaire responses
   - Compliance requirements
   - Document sections and guidelines

6. Add your feedback:
   - Click **{{< fa comment >}} Add Comment** to provide specific feedback
   - Use the **{{< fa flag >}} Flag** feature to highlight areas requiring attention
   - Attach supporting documents if needed

7. Take action:
   - Click **{{< fa check >}} Accept** if the attestation meets requirements
   - Click **{{< fa xmark >}} Reject** if changes are needed
   - Click **{{< fa clock >}} Request Changes** to send back for revision

::: {.callout}
The attestation sidebar is persistent between findings and inventory views, making it easy to reference attestation information while reviewing other model details.
:::

## What's next

- [Approve attestation](approve-attestation.qmd)
- [Manage attestation templates](manage-attestation-templates.qmd)

<!-- FOOTNOTES -->

[^1]: [Register models in the inventory](/guide/model-inventory/register-models-in-inventory.qmd)

[^2]: [Create attestation](create-attestation.qmd)

[^3]: [Manage permissions](/guide/configuration/manage-permissions.qmd)

[^4]: [Working with the model inventory](/guide/model-inventory/working-with-model-inventory.qmd#search-filter-and-sort-models)
